title: GatewayReceipt v1
description: Machine-readable schema for a fiat-to-credit or credit-to-fiat crossing performed by a trusted prepaid gateway node.

receipt/id.description: Stable identifier of the gateway receipt.

gateway/node-id.description: Trusted gateway node that performed the external settlement crossing.

direction.description: Direction of value crossing the protocol boundary. `inbound` credits a local account, `outbound` debits it for payout.

external/amount.description: Amount observed on the external payment rail.

external/currency.description: External settlement currency or tender symbol.

internal/amount.description: Credited or debited amount in internal minor units.

internal/currency.description: Internal settlement unit used by the supervised ledger in MVP.

account/id.description: Local supervised account affected by the gateway event.

ts.description: Timestamp when the gateway event was committed for audit.

external/payment-ref.description: Gateway-side payment reference such as a PSP transaction id or bank transfer reference.

external/provider.description: Payment service provider or banking rail label used by the gateway.

exchange-policy/ref.description: Optional reference to the gateway-side pricing or exchange policy in force for this event.
